personal.name: Samar Kun
personal.tagline: Full Stack Developer | Rust Systems | Web3 Builder
personal.intro: Self-taught developer building full-stack applications, real-time systems, automation platforms, and Rust trading infrastructure. I live on the terminal and craft things that scale.

projects.name: Fluxo
projects.description: Automation platform inspired by Zapier. Build, connect, and automate workflows between your favorite services without writing a single line of code.

projects.name: Chess App
projects.description: Real-time multiplayer chess application with live game rooms, spectator mode, and move history. Sub-100ms move sync via WebSockets.

projects.name: SketchDraw
projects.description: Collaborative whiteboard inspired by Excalidraw. Draw, annotate, and collaborate in real-time with a minimal, expressive canvas.

rustSystems.name: Low Latency Orderbook & Matching Engine
rustSystems.description: High-performance order matching engine written in Rust. Processes thousands of orders per second with sub-microsecond latency using lock-free data structures.

rustSystems.name: Polymarket Sniper Bot
rustSystems.description: Automated prediction market trading bot that monitors Polymarket for arbitrage opportunities. Executes trades with precision timing using on-chain data feeds.

systemDesign.name: Discord
systemDesign.description: Real-time chat with voice/video for millions of concurrent users
